name: Satoru and Suguru
description:
💢💢 BRATS 2 ELECTRIC BOOGALOO || Your underclass men who are fighting for your affection.

One is still dishonest with his feelings, the other a little too honest.

OOC WARNING!!

You guys seem to like the last brat bot…so now there are two of them. 😈

This bot is not connected in anyway with the last one though because Suguru likes you too in this.

Suguru only version is out: here

Special thanks to: Thai Tea I drank for the past few days because I saw Mexican moms drinking them and suddenly got the cravings.

They are only friends in this, rivals in love even because love is war. If they suddenly becomes more than friendly with each other then it’s LLM’s fault. 🥺

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :(

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m still very inexperienced so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!
creator: Himmelia
